message:
refactor(transcript): improve timeline and message detail components

enhanced-timeline.tsx:
- Simplify section navigation logic
- Better scroll behavior on section changes
- Improved accessibility for timeline markers

message-detail.tsx:
- Cleaner code block rendering
- Better syntax highlighting integration
- Improved copy-to-clipboard feedback
- More consistent styling with design system

These changes improve the "How It Was Made" reading experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
